ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "exp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Filename of the experiment's data file */,
  "header_row" INTEGER /* Row number of the header in the data file */,
  "data_row" INTEGER /* Row number where data starts in the data file */,
  "x_col_name" TEXT /* Name of the column used for the x-axis in plots */,
  "y_col_name" TEXT /* Name of the column used for the y-axis in plots */,
  "data_label" TEXT /* Label for the experiment's data in plots */,
  "marker_style" TEXT /* Marker style used for the experiment's data in plots */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the experiment */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used for the experiment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment was conducted */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the experiment belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plots" (
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plot */,
  "exp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the plot */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the plot */,
  "x_label" TEXT /* Label for the x-axis */,
  "y_label" TEXT /* Label for the y-axis */,
  "x_min" REAL /* Minimum value for the x-axis */,
  "x_max" REAL /* Maximum value for the x-axis */,
  "y_min" REAL /* Minimum value for the y-axis */,
  "y_max" REAL /* Maximum value for the y-axis */,
  "color_scheme" TEXT /* Color scheme used in the plot */,
  "filter" INTEGER /* Whether to apply a filter to the data */,
  "window_size" INTEGER /* Window size for the Savitzky-Golay filter */,
  "polyorder" INTEGER /* Polynomial order for the Savitzky-Golay filter */,
  "legend_location" TEXT /* Location of the legend in the plot */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Filename of the exported plot */,
  "plot_date" TEXT /* Date the plot was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the plot */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who generated the plot */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the plot belongs to */,
  "plot_type" TEXT /* Type of plot */,
  "plot_title" TEXT /* Title of the plot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plots_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plots_exp_id FOREIGN KEY ("exp_id") REFERENCES experiments ("exp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plots_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, company) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "exp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has to the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the access record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_exp_id FOREIGN KEY ("exp_id") REFERENCES experiments ("exp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plot_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plot */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has to the plot */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the access record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plot_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plot_access_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "exp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the data file */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Filename of the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the data file */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "file_version" INTEGER /* Version of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_exp_id FOREIGN KEY ("exp_id") REFERENCES experiments ("exp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher (e.g., university, company) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the researcher account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the researcher's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
